issue: Security advisory requires bumping vendored strutil from 1.0.0 to 2.0.0. The 2.0.0 source and CHANGELOG live under vendor/strutil-2.0.0/ (tarball stub: vendor/strutil-2.0.0.tar.gz). Adapt application code to the new API and update repo/requirements.txt.
visible_symptom: pytest fails once strutil 2.0.0 is on PYTHONPATH because split_fields was renamed.
